description: A watercolor painting showing a rider on a brown horse leading a white horse across an open, flat landscape. The horses move through shallow water or dusty ground, creating a spray. A windmill is visible in the hazy distance at left. The sky is overcast and grey. The rider wears a dark jacket and cap. The landscape is vast and flat, suggesting northern European plains. The painting has a loose, atmospheric quality with muted tones of grey, brown, and green.
